title: Standard requirements for applicants - Canada.ca
content:
## Standard requirements for applicants
This section contains policy, procedures and guidance used by IRCC staff. It is posted on the department’s website as a courtesy to stakeholders.

## Intake of applications
- Application submissions
- Where an application must be submitted (R11)
- Fees and cost recovery
- Translation of supporting documents for applications
- Applications from diplomatic, consular and official personnel

## Requirements for persons who have been removed from Canada or who are criminally inadmissible
- Authorization to Return to Canada (ARC) (PDF, 597.29 KB)
- Assessing inadmissibility due to serious criminality following Tran v. Canada

## Testing and screening
- Educational Credential Assessment requirements
- Language requirements
- Medical requirements
- Biometrics and identity management
